# Captured compaction outputs

Each `<scenario>.md` is the **raw compaction output** — the compacted message
(handoff-framed summary) that becomes the new active window, exactly as the
next turn receives it. Generated by `TestCaptureCompactionOutputs` (model
`claude-haiku-4-5`). Token estimates are JSON bytes ÷ 4.

| Scenario | Active window before | After | Reduction |
|---|---|---|---|
| [codebase_onboarding](codebase_onboarding.md) | 14 msgs / ~2,246 tok | 1 msg / ~1,165 tok | 48% |
| [incident_triage](incident_triage.md) | 12 msgs / ~2,035 tok | 1 msg / ~1,082 tok | 47% |
| [swe_debugging](swe_debugging.md) | 48 msgs / ~5,302 tok | 1 msg / ~1,352 tok | 75% |
